settings.headline: BUILT FOR THE ONES WHO CARE
settings.subheadline: Premium detailing tools for the car community. Founded in Tempe, Arizona.

settings.statement: PREMIUM DOESN'T HAVE TO MEAN OVERPRICED. · TESTED IN THE REAL WORLD. · BUILT BY ENTHUSIASTS. ·

settings.label: Our Story
settings.heading: BUILT BY ENTHUSIASTS.
settings.body_text: We started Polaris because we were tired of overpaying for detailing products that didn't perform. Built from the car community, tested on real cars, priced for real people.

settings.product_description: The 1200 GSM microfiber drying towel built for enthusiasts who actually care about their paint.

settings.name: Marcus T.
settings.review_text: Absolutely incredible towel. The 1200 GSM is a game changer on my ceramic coated car.

settings.name: Jordan K.
settings.review_text: Finally a drying towel that doesn't leave water spots. Polaris just earned a customer for life.

settings.name: Tyler M.
settings.review_text: These guys actually know cars. Product quality is insane for the price.
